documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms: 150 units at $18,000 (Period 1), 150 at $18,630 (Period 2), 125 at $19,282 (Period 3), 125 at $19,957 (Period 4), 125 at $20,655 (Period 5)
Mission Days Operational support: 30 days per period at $2,850/day × 5 periods = $427,500
Operational and Testing Support: 6 sessions per period at $6,000 × 5 periods = $180,000
Operator and Observer Training Sessions: 1 per period at $6,000 × 5 periods = $30,000
Instructor Training Sessions: 1 per period at $600 × 5 periods = $3,000
Travel for Operational Support: NTE $50,000 per period × 5 periods (assumed full utilization)
Operator and Observer Course Development: $6,000 per period × 5 periods = $30,000; Instructor Training Course Development: $6,000 per period × 5 periods = $30,000
Non-recurring Engineering (NRE): Technical Documentation, Modeling, and NHC workflow integration at NTE $66,000 each × 3 line items × 5 periods = $990,000 (assuming full utilization of NTE amounts)
